about-page.route_to_europe_title: GreenBus — bus tickets online across Ukraine and Europe
about-page.route_to_europe_text: GreenBus is an online bus ticket service connecting Ukraine with European countries. In a couple of minutes you can compare partner carriers by price and time, book online and get an e-ticket by email. Live schedules, card payment with no booking fee and easy route search — all in one place.
about-page.professional_solutions_text: We bring 100+ carriers into a single search so you can easily find the right trip. Card payment with no fee, an instant e-ticket by email, up-to-date schedules and honest carrier reviews help you choose the best way to travel across Ukraine and Europe.
about-page.about_us_text: GreenBus has worked in passenger transport since 2019. In 2020 we united leading carriers and bus-station solution providers under one brand and built a convenient online ticketing ecosystem. Today GreenBus helps thousands of passengers buy bus tickets online every day.
about-page.main_product_text: With GreenBus you can buy tickets for popular international routes — to Poland, Germany, Czechia and other European countries — as well as domestic trips across Ukraine. Choose your departure and arrival cities in the search form, compare trips and book online anytime.
about-page.individual_approach_text: GreenBus is also a technology platform for carriers, bus stations and agencies. We offer a trip dispatch and ticket-sales system with flexible configuration so partners can automate sales and route management. Want to partner with us — get in touch.

statistics.2_000_text: Routes operated by GreenBus across various destinations.
statistics.5_million_text: Passengers travel with GreenBus every year.

about-page.alt_route: GreenBus coach on a route from Ukraine to Europe
about-page.alt_team: GreenBus team — online bus ticket sales
about-page.alt_world: GreenBus international bus routes across Europe
about-page.alt_business: GreenBus platform for carriers and bus stations
about-page.faq_a1: GreenBus is an online bus ticket service connecting Ukraine with European countries. You compare partner carriers by price and time and book your ticket online.
about-page.faq_a2: No. GreenBus does not operate trips itself — it is an aggregator: trips are provided by partner carriers, while we offer search, booking and the e-ticket.
about-page.faq_q3: Is it safe to buy tickets on GreenBus?
about-page.faq_a3: Yes. Payment is made by Visa or MasterCard with no booking fee, and the e-ticket is sent to your email instantly and is available in your Personal Account.
about-page.faq_q4: Which countries can I buy tickets to?
about-page.faq_a4: GreenBus offers international routes to Poland, Germany, Czechia and other European countries, as well as domestic routes across Ukraine.
about-page.faq_q5: How do I buy a bus ticket?
about-page.faq_a5: Enter the departure city, arrival city and date in the search form, choose a trip, fill in passenger details and pay by card — the e-ticket will arrive by email.
